fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the related document.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's reference. The contents will be printed on purchase documents.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the address to which you want the items in the purchase order to be shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's posting date.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date you expect to receive the order.
The program will copy the date to all the purchase lines created under the header, but you can change it on individual lines. When you change the expected date on the purchase header, the date on the lines can be changed.
The date affects the item availability (that you can see by choosing Item, Availability on the item card), which is automatically updated to show the available inventory.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the related invoice must be paid.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment discount percentage that is granted if you pay on or before the date entered in the Pmt. Discount Date field. The discount percentage is specified in the Payment Terms Code field.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the amount in the entry must be paid for a payment discount to be granted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the unit price on the line should be displayed including or excluding VAT.
If the field is blank, the unit price will be shown without VAT.
Click the field to insert a check mark if you want to see the unit price including VAT.

fields.name: Vendor Invoice No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number that the vendor uses for the invoice you are creating in this purchase invoice header.
You can then use the number later if, for some reason, you need to search for the posted purchase line using the vendor's number for the document.

fields.name: Vendor Cr. Memo No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number that the vendor uses for the credit memo you are creating in this purchase credit memo header.
You can then use the number later if, for some reason, you need to search for the posted purchase line using the vendor's number for the document.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
You use this field only when there is a drop shipment.
Enter the number of the customer who will have the item shipped directly from your vendor.
To see the customer numbers that have been set up in the Customer table, click the field.
When you have entered the customer number, the program will automatically fill in the other fields that relate to drop shipments. These are the Ship-to Name, Ship-to Name 2, Ship-to Address, Ship-to Address 2, Ship-to City and Ship-to Contact fields.
If the customer has several ship-to addresses, you can specify one of them in the Ship-to Code field.
When the customer number is entered in the field, you can choose Functions, Drop Shipment, Get Sales Order from the purchase lines. The program displays a list of all the orders from this customer, and you can choose the ones that will be drop shipments.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the shipping address.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the intercompany partner that the transaction is related to if the entry was created from an intercompany transaction.

fields.name: IC Transaction No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the intercompany transaction. The transaction number indicates which line in the IC Outbox Transaction table the document is related to.

fields.name: Transaction Source
fields.tooltip: Specifies which company created the transaction.

fields.name: Requested Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date you asked the vendor to deliver the order to the ship-to address.

fields.name: Promised Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the vendor has promised to deliver the order.
